name: Diversified Energy Co
summary: PART I Business Overview We are engaged in the production, transportation, and marketing of natural gas, NGLs, and oil, managing a diversified portfolio of mature, long-life assets. Our assets are located in the United States within the following geographical operating areas: Appalachian Region, which spans Ohio, Pennsylvania, Virginia, West Virginia, Kentucky, Tennessee and Alabama; Central Region, which includes Texas, Oklahoma, New Mexico, Louisiana and Arkansas; Other, which includes Florida...
